fields.title: Harden tau runtime state ownership and remove hidden mutable execution locals
fields.description: After the execution-profile migrations land, clean up remaining hidden mutable state and duplicate runtime ownership so tau-managed execution really lives in Effect services with Schema-backed boundaries.
fields.design: Audit and remove hidden execution-related mutable locals and split-brain state, including prompt-mode session defaults and feature-specific ad-hoc runtime mutation that should flow through execution services. Refactor remaining session-runtime maps toward clearer Effect-owned state where it materially affects execution control. Preserve Pi as the runtime kernel; do not try to copy session/transcript/UI internals into tau.
